data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deduped source selections per grant.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Deduped source selections per grant', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that directly address this requirement. While there are multiple prior steps that confirm various functionalities related to bookings and resource management, none of them specifically validate the deduplication of source selections. This indicates a gap in the evidence provided for the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of functionality related to 'Deduped source selections per grant'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
